title: Aspiring founder confused about AI path — how to find direction like him?
author: Serious_Truck283
selftext: $WTF is a meme stock of Zhou Kai founded - based on totally shifted focus heavily toward AI. Founded by Zhou Kai, the company ditched the old brokerage model and doubled down on AI.The stock now trades around $5, but on day one it exploded to $20. That debut turned heads fast. The big pivot? Transforming into a “broker’s broker” with its platform called Brokerage Cloud, built to serve other brokerages. Zhou admits the move wasn’t a master plan—it was more about making use of sunk costs. Still, it worked. At just 30, he rang the opening bell himself, becoming one of the youngest founders to take a company public this year.
